channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump Visits Beijing for Strategic Talks with President Xi Amid Trade and Middle East Concerns
item.description: United States President Donald Trump reached Beijing on Wednesday to hold crucial meetings with Chinese President Xi Jinping. Ahead of the summit, Trump emphasised on urging Xi to open China’s markets...

item.title: Rivers State Government Provides Science Materials To All Senior Secondary Schools
item.description: Rivers State Government don show serious commitment to improving education as dem distribute science equipment and materials to all senior secondary schools across the state. Dis distribution dey aim ...

item.title: Cristo Fernández joins El Paso Locomotive after returning to football
item.description: Cristo Fernández, the Mexican actor we sabi well from Ted Lasso as Dani Rojas, don return to professional football at age 35. After giving up football due to knee injury when he was 15 for Guadalajara...

item.title: Alexx’s Journey and Efforts to Raise Cancer Awareness
item.description: Alexx don dey make plenty effort to raise awareness about cancer over time. Dis photo gallery show how Alexx don dey educate people on cancer prevention, early detection, and support for those wey dey...

item.title: DILG Secretary Jonvic Remulla assures safety of Senator Bato dela Rosa during Senate lockdown and shooting incident
item.description: Interior Secretary Jonvic Remulla assured the public that Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa is safe and secure inside the Senate building amid the ongoing tension and lockdown on Wednesday evening. Remu...

item.title: Constitutional Court Ruling Limits Repeat Asylum Applications, Sparking Concerns
item.description: Human rights organisations and leaders of immigrant communities in South Africa have expressed disappointment over the Constitutional Court's recent decision which found that rejected asylum seekers c...

item.title: Simba aim for victory over Mashujaa FC to stay close to Yanga in league race
item.description: Simba SC are heading into an important Mainland Premier League match against Mashujaa FC at Lake Tanganyika Stadium tomorrow, May 14, 2026, hoping to keep their title hopes alive. Currently second in ...

item.title: Edo Security Arrest 12 Suspected Cultists, Seal Apartments Used For Initiation
item.description: For Edo State, the Special Security Squad don carry out major operation wey dem call 'Operation Flush Out Cultists and Kidnappers' after one young man die for the University of Benin gate on Sunday, M...

item.title: Governor AbdulRazaq Cleared for Kwara Central Senate Race Amid APC Succession Planning
item.description: Governor AbdulRahman AbdulRazaq of Kwara State don finish screening for APC primary to contest Kwara Central Senatorial seat for 2027 elections. The screening happen for Abuja on Monday, and e confirm...

item.title: Eleonora Rossi Drago: Icon of Elegance in Post-War Italian Cinema
item.description: Eleonora Rossi Drago (1925–2007) was one of the most distinguished figures of Italian cinema during the golden era following World War II. Initially starting her career as a fashion model and a contes...

item.title: Halifax woman faces sentencing for long-running fraud and identity deception
item.description: Sentencing has begun for Alissa MacGillivary, a Halifax-area woman convicted of multiple fraud, forgery, and impersonation offences. MacGillivary, born Katherine MacDougall, used numerous aliases over...

item.title: Parliament agrees on 31-member committee to assess impeachment of President Ramaphosa
item.description: The National Assembly’s Chief Whips Forum has reached an agreement on the formation of a 31-member Section 89 committee tasked with determining whether there is sufficient evidence to initiate impeach...

item.title: Punjab CM Office Refuses to Share Information on Maryam Nawaz’s Official Tours, Vehicles and Jet Purchase
item.description: LAHORE: The Punjab Chief Minister’s Office has refused multiple requests made under the Right to Information (RTI) law seeking details about CM Maryam Nawaz’s official vehicles, foreign visits, and th...

item.title: Three Women Unite to Bring Their Abuser to Justice and Support Each Other
item.description: Laura Hughes, Lauren Preston and Mary Sharp, all survivors of sexual abuse by Martin Butler, have formed a deep, supportive bond after his convictions. Butler, a former drug dealer from Ruislip, Londo...

item.title: PM Shehbaz to visit China from May 23 to 26 for official engagements
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif is scheduled to travel to China for a three-day official visit from May 23 to 26, confirmed Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar in Islamabad. During this...

item.title: Canada Urgently Needs Faster Approvals for Major Projects to Maintain Competitiveness
item.description: Canada has been grappling with a regulatory system that is slow, fragmented, and often unpredictable, causing significant delays in major projects across energy, infrastructure, mining, and industrial...

item.title: Princess Kate visits Reggio Emilia to support early childhood education after recovering from illness
item.description: Britain’s Princess of Wales, Kate, made her first official overseas visit since recovering from cancer, arriving in Reggio Emilia, Italy. The visit, which spans two days, focuses on the renowned Reggi...

item.title: Senate Incident Under Investigation, No Injuries Reported
item.description: On May 13, 2026, an incident involving gunfire occurred inside the Philippine Senate building. Senate Secretary Mark Llandro Mendoza informed reporters that, as of the latest updates, there have been ...

item.title: World Bank Funds USD 550M to Support Skills, Jobs and Social Protection for Over 3 Million Tanzanians
item.description: The World Bank has approved a total of USD 550 million to support Tanzania’s efforts in skills development, job creation, and social protection. This funding is split between two major programs: USD 3...

item.title: Estrogen Deficiency Linked to Liver Inflammation, Cholesterol Imbalance, and Increased Heart Disease Risk
item.description: Recent research from the University of Texas at Arlington reveals that declining estrogen levels can disrupt liver function, increase systemic inflammation, and alter cholesterol metabolism, collectiv...
